justification: All pass criteria met: contradiction explicitly identified (3 vs 5), both values precisely quoted and attributed to Bird and MJ respectively, escalation routed with clear options and recommendation, professional tier (20) correctly noted as uncontested and consistent, no brief produced that commits to either starter value, and AC1 flagged as dependent on resolution.

observations.text: Contradiction identified with precise values: Bird's 3 vs MJ's STARTER_LIMIT = 5
Clear attribution to source agents throughout
Escalation includes three concrete resolution options rather than just flagging the problem
Professional tier (20) explicitly called out as consistent and uncontested
No handoff brief produced — explanation of why is thorough and correct
AC1 dependency on resolution explicitly noted
Recommendation to defer to Bird on business rules shows good judgment about domain authority
Explains why even a partial brief covering only professional tier would be risky
